infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: KrAItos uses the camera to scan your meal and analyze its nutritional content.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: KrAItos accesses your photo library so you can pick a meal photo for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: KrAItos saves meal photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: KrAItos uses the microphone so you can log meals by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: KrAItos transcribes what you say to add meals to your nutrition log.
